prompt:
A high-quality, realistic candid photo of a beautiful young woman in a crowded sports arena. She has long, wavy dark brown hair flowing over her shoulders. She is wearing a cream-colored baseball cap backwards and an oversized, distressed dark brown leather jacket. She is posing from a side profile, looking up and away from the camera with a playful smirk and glossy pink lips. The background is a blurry indoor stadium with bright overhead lights, spectators, and flags. Cinematic lighting, slight lens flare, 8k resolution, highly detailed skin texture, shot on a modern smartphone, natural aesthetic.
